areAllSectionsEmpty.description: Is true if the current values equals the empty value. For a single item value, it means that value === null For a range value, it means that value === [null, null]

contentEditable.description:
If true, the whole element is editable.
Useful when all the sections are selected.

elements.description:
The elements to render.
Each element contains the prop to edit a section of the value.

error.description: If true, the input will indicate an error.

fullWidth.description: If true, the input will take up the full width of its container.

inputRef.description: Pass a ref to the input element.

slotProps.description: The props used for each component slot.

slots.description: The components used for each slot inside.

disabled.description: State class applied to the root element if `disabled=true`.

error.description: State class applied to the root element if `error=true`.

required.description: State class applied to the root element id `required=true`

slotDescriptions.formHelperText: The component used for the form helper text slot.
slotDescriptions.htmlInput: The component rendered as the underlying hidden `<input>` element.
slotDescriptions.input:
The component used for the input slot.
Defaults to one of `PickersInput`, `PickersFilledInput`, `PickersOutlinedInput` based on `variant`.
slotDescriptions.inputLabel: The component used for the input label slot.
slotDescriptions.root: The component used for the root slot.
